text: I feel a sense of disorientation, both spatial and existential, upon entering this dim, institutional hallway. It is strangely quiet, save for the distant hum of fluorescent lights and the echo of my footsteps. Crossing the threshold into the next room, where research and innovation are celebrated, my mind wanders. The text about sunlight and curiosity stirs something contemplative within me. I feel small, yet somehow a part of this greater human endeavor to seek knowledge, to connect, and to remember—the openness above and within inviting me to ponder my place in the ever-expanding world of ideas.
